data.title: Crypto Czar David Sacks Says Trump Was 'Right About This' As He Slams Washington's Bipartisan Consensus On 'Unfettered Free Trade'
data.description: Tech investor David Sacks criticizes America's support for free trade, praises Trump's challenge to the bipartisan consensus. Tariffs on China signal a turning point in Washington.

data.title: EXCLUSIVE: La Rosa FY24 Revenue Jumps 119%, CEO Reiterates FY25 Topline Goal Of $100 Million
data.description: La Rosa Holdings (LRHC) reported strong financial results for 2024, with total revenue increasing by 119% and plans to expand internationally and acquire additional brokerage firms.

data.title: Netflix's 'Black Mirror' Returns With Grim Warning About Life Trapped Behind Endless Paywalls
data.description: The creators of Black Mirror deliver a chilling narrative about our reliance on subscription-based living, with the story of a couple's desperate measures to afford life-saving technology.

data.title: Nvidia Didn't Alert Chinese Clients About US Export Limits On H20 AI Chip: Report
data.description: Nvidia Corp. (NASDAQ: NVDA) has reportedly not communicated to some of its major Chinese customers about the new U.S. export rules affecting its AI chip.

data.title: Trump Orders Critical Minerals Probe As China Tightens Controls Over Rare Commodities In Retaliatory Move
data.description: Trump orders probe into critical mineral import tariffs for defense, energy, and technology sectors, due to US' reliance on China and lack of alternative supply chains.
